short_definition: A named reusable DAG shape for common delegated work patterns.
description: DelegationDAGTemplate captures reusable orchestration shapes such as parallel research, synthesis, implementation/review/repair, guarded publication, and other repeated worker topologies so operators do not keep hand-authoring the same graph.

authority.notes: The delegated-task surface exposes reusable workflow templates and validates DAG expansion.

examples: parallel research -> join -> synthesize -> execute -> review

confidence.basis: The delegated-task MCP already exposes a template catalog and DAG expansion behavior.
